raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased a bathroom vanity from Wayfair. it arrived damaged. I contacted their live chat agent and they told me there was nothing they could do for me. That i could not return or get a refund. So, i opened a credit card dispute with Citi. I the meantime I found a different way to contact wayfair. They keep dragging things along trying not be involved between me and the manufacturer. Eventually they offered me 25 % off the purchase price. i emailed back asking for more off, so that i could have the damage pieces repaired and they rescinded their offer because of the open chargeback. They then told citi that i was outside the return window after they waited months to provide citi with information for the dispute. 

Citi closed the dispute in wayfair 's favor. leaving me with a damaged vanity and charging me for it and no way to return it.
